fields.name: instruction
fields.description: The task instruction provided to the model.
fields.example: You are a cross lingual expert...

fields.name: source_idiom
fields.description: The idiom in the source language.

fields.name: target_idiom
fields.description: The correct idiom in the target language.

fields.name: target_meaning
fields.description: The meaning of the target idiom.

fields.name: options_detail
fields.description: A dictionary of multiple-choice options (e.g., A–D).

fields.name: correct_option
fields.description: The correct answer label after shuffling.

fields.name: correct_position
fields.description: The position index of the correct answer in the shuffled options.

fields.name: original_positions
fields.description: Mapping from shuffled options to their original order before shuffling.
